compiled_state.title: review-workflow: stale .claude/tmp/review-diff-*.patch file left after review -> blocks merge-to-main
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
After the review agent completes, a .claude/tmp/review-diff-<hash>.patch file is left behind in the worktree. merge-to-main.sh checks for uncommitted changes and rejects with 'ERROR: Uncommitted changes on worktree' because this untracked file exists.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (via commit workflow Step 5)
2. Commit successfully
3. Run merge-to-main.sh
4. Error: 'Uncommitted changes on worktree. Commit or stash first.' pointing to .claude/tmp/review-diff-*.patch

## Expected Behavior
Review workflow should clean up the patch file after review completes, or merge-to-main.sh should ignore files in .claude/tmp/.

## Workaround
rm -f .claude/tmp/review-diff-*.patch

comments.body: Investigation complete: Bug is NOT reproducible. (1) .claude/tmp/ does not exist and no code writes review-diff-*.patch there. (2) Review diffs are written to /tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/ (outside repo) as .txt files. (3) .gitignore already excludes .claude/tmp/. (4) merge-to-main.sh dirty check uses --exclude-standard which honors .gitignore. The described scenario cannot occur with current code. Closing as invalid.
comments.author: Test
